name: DAEVA

abilities.name: Demise (Spectral Passage)
abilities.text: After this model is killed, it may make a Shadow Door marker in base contact with itself.

abilities.name: Made to Kill
abilities.text: Once per activation. After this model is placed, it may declare a (melee) action after resolving the current action.

abilities.name: Resilient
abilities.text: Attacks targeting this model reduce raises they receive by 1 (to a minimum of 0).

actions.name: Maul
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target is within 2" of a Shadow Door marker, this action receives a (+).

triggers.name: Lingering Shadow
triggers.text: Make a Shadow Door marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Envelop in Shadow
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Ally only. Enemy models within (aura)1" of the target must pass a TN 13 Wp duel or be dealt 2 damage.

triggers.name: Fall into Darkness
triggers.text: Place the target in base contact with a Shadow Door marker within 6".

actions.name: Unnatural Speed
actions.effects: Place this model anywhere within range.

triggers.name: Reclaim Shadow
triggers.text: Remove a Shadow Door marker within 3" of this model. This model heals 2.

extraction_notes: STN: 9 appears below artwork - unclear what this represents
